summary: Verified P0 bug fix for Mining Page 'Collect' button. All 14 backend tests passed. The frontend correctly uses /api/mining/collect/{uid} endpoint (line 492 in Mining.js). Full mining session lifecycle tested: Start → Status → Collect → Balance Update → Session Reset → New Session.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend Mining.js line 492 correctly uses /api/mining/collect/{uid} endpoint
Backend /api/mining/collect correctly resets mining_active=False and mining_start_time=None after collect
Backend /api/mining/claim endpoint correctly redirects to /collect for backward compatibility
Mining rate calculation follows Growth Economy formula: R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)), base rate 550 PRC/day
Session lifecycle properly handles: start → accumulate → collect → reset → restart

success_rate.frontend: N/A - backend only testing as requested

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mining session lifecycle fully verified. P0 bug fix confirmed - frontend now uses correct /api/mining/collect endpoint. Test user burn-test-1-e8c8c055 is elite with ~49431 PRC balance. Mining rate is 22.92 PRC/hr (550 PRC/day base rate with 0 referrals).

features_tested.POST /api/mining/start/{uid}: PASS - Starts mining session for elite user, returns session_start, session_end, mining_rate
features_tested.GET /api/mining/status/{uid}: PASS - Returns session_active, mined_coins, mining_rate_per_hour, time_remaining
features_tested.POST /api/mining/collect/{uid}: PASS - Collects mined PRC, returns collected_amount and new_balance
features_tested.New session after collect: PASS - Can start new session immediately after collect
features_tested.Collect with no session: PASS - Returns 400 error 'No active mining session'
features_tested.GET /api/mining/rate-breakdown/{uid}: PASS - Returns Growth Economy formula details

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Mining Page 'Collect' button was not updating PRC balance and not resetting session state
p0_bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend was calling deprecated /api/mining/claim endpoint instead of /api/mining/collect
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Frontend Mining.js line 492 changed to use /api/mining/collect/{uid}
evidence: Frontend code at line 492 uses correct endpoint: axios.post(`${API}/mining/collect/${user.uid}`)
Backend /api/mining/collect correctly updates prc_balance and resets session state
All 14 lifecycle tests pass including balance update verification
